Interface StaffService

All Known Implementing Classes:
StaffServiceImpl
public interface StaffService
Loads the current operator's staff profile from a file at application startup. The loaded Staff object represents the person performing operations in this session.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Staff>
    findByRole(String role)
    Returns all staff members with the given role.
    List<Staff>
    listAll()
    Returns all staff members registered in the system.
    Staff
    loadCurrentStaff(String filePath)
    Reads a staff profile from the given file path and returns the corresponding Staff object.

  • Method Details

    • loadCurrentStaff

      Staff loadCurrentStaff(String filePath)
      Reads a staff profile from the given file path and returns the corresponding Staff object. Throws an exception if the file cannot be read or the profile data is invalid.
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path to the staff profile file (CSV or JSON)
      Returns:
      the Staff object representing the current operator

    • listAll

      List<Staff> listAll()
      Returns all staff members registered in the system. Returns an empty list if no staff are registered.
      Returns:
      a list of all staff members

    • findByRole

      List<Staff> findByRole(String role)
      Returns all staff members with the given role. Returns an empty list if no staff with that role exist.
      Parameters:
      role - the role to filter by (e.g. "Veterinarian", "Coordinator")
      Returns:
      a list of staff members with the specified role
